lineage.Process: CreateLocator USA "Addresses PointAddress" "PointAddress.HOUSE_NUMBER 'Addresses.shp'.HSE_NUM";"PointAddress.STREET_NAME 'Addresses.shp'.STREET";"PointAddress.FULL_STREET_NAME 'Addresses.shp'.FULL_ADD";"PointAddress.DISPLAY_X 'Addresses.shp'.X_COORD";"PointAddress.DISPLAY_Y 'Addresses.shp'.Y_COORD" C:\PSU\geog489\lesson5\analysis_project\NorfolkCityAddresses ENG # # # GLOBAL_EXTRA_HIGH CURRENT_VERSION
